A

addScore(String, int) - Method in class com.arcade.service.RankingService
Adds a new score to the ranking and persists it immediately.
AnswerCardView - Class in com.arcade.view
Builds a clickable answer option card.
AnswerCardView(String) - Constructor for class com.arcade.view.AnswerCardView
 
AudioService - Class in com.arcade.service
Loads and plays the background music playlist for the application.
AudioService() - Constructor for class com.arcade.service.AudioService
Creates an audio service that uses the default application class loader.
AudioService(ClassLoader) - Constructor for class com.arcade.service.AudioService
Creates an audio service that uses the provided class loader.

Controls category selection navigation.

Builds the category selection screen.

com.arcade - package com.arcade
 
com.arcade.controller - package com.arcade.controller
 
com.arcade.model - package com.arcade.model
 
com.arcade.service - package com.arcade.service
 
com.arcade.util - package com.arcade.util
 
com.arcade.view - package com.arcade.view
 
createObjectMapper() - Static method in class com.arcade.util.JsonUtils
Creates a new object mapper configured for the application JSON format.

G

GameController - Class in com.arcade.controller
Controls the game screen and routes answer submissions to the backend.
GameController(Scene, GameService, RankingService) - Constructor for class com.arcade.controller.GameController
 
GameService - Class in com.arcade.service
Provides the core game loop and state transitions for the terminal game.
GameService() - Constructor for class com.arcade.service.GameService
Creates a game service with a default question service.
GameService(QuestionService) - Constructor for class com.arcade.service.GameService
Creates a game service with the provided question service.
GameSession - Class in com.arcade.model
Represents the current state of a running game session.
GameSession() - Constructor for class com.arcade.model.GameSession
Creates an empty game session with default values.
GameSession(int, int, int, List<Question>, boolean) - Constructor for class com.arcade.model.GameSession
Creates a game session with all fields initialized.
GameView - Class in com.arcade.view
Builds the fixed visual skeleton of the game screen.
GameView(String, List<String>, String, String) - Constructor for class com.arcade.view.GameView
 
getAllQuestions() - Method in class com.arcade.service.QuestionService
Returns all loaded questions as an immutable copy.
getAnswerCards() - Method in class com.arcade.view.GameView
 
getAvailableCategories() - Method in class com.arcade.service.QuestionService
Returns the available question categories in their display order.
getCategory() - Method in class com.arcade.model.Question
Returns the question category.
getCategoryButtons() - Method in class com.arcade.view.CategorySelectionView
 
getCorrectAnswer() - Method in class com.arcade.model.Question
Returns the correct answer.
getCurrentQuestion() - Method in class com.arcade.service.GameService
Returns the current question in the session.
getCurrentQuestionIndex() - Method in class com.arcade.model.GameSession
Returns the current question index.
getCurrentQuestionNumber() - Method in class com.arcade.service.GameService
Returns the 1-based number of the current question.
getCurrentScore() - Method in class com.arcade.model.GameSession
Returns the current score.
getDifficulty() - Method in class com.arcade.model.Question
Returns the question difficulty.
getExitButton() - Method in class com.arcade.view.MainMenuView
 
getExtraContent() - Method in class com.arcade.model.Question
Returns the additional content for the question.
getFinalScoreLabel() - Method in class com.arcade.view.ResultView
 
getHeaderPanelView() - Method in class com.arcade.view.GameView
 
getId() - Method in class com.arcade.model.Question
Returns the question identifier.
getLoadedQuestions() - Method in class com.arcade.model.GameSession
Returns the loaded questions for the session.
getLoadedQuestions() - Method in class com.arcade.service.GameService
Returns the questions loaded in the current game session.
getMainMenuButton() - Method in class com.arcade.view.RankingView
 
getOptions() - Method in class com.arcade.model.Question
Returns the available answer options.
getPlayButton() - Method in class com.arcade.view.MainMenuView
 
getPlayedAt() - Method in class com.arcade.model.RankingEntry
Returns the date and time when the game was played.
getPlayerName() - Method in class com.arcade.model.RankingEntry
Returns the player name.
getPlayerNameField() - Method in class com.arcade.view.ResultView
 
getQuestionById(Integer) - Method in class com.arcade.service.QuestionService
Finds a question by its identifier.
getQuestionCardView() - Method in class com.arcade.view.GameView
 
getQuestionsByCategory(String) - Method in class com.arcade.service.QuestionService
Returns only the questions that belong to the requested category.
getQuestionsByCategoryAndDifficulty(String, String) - Method in class com.arcade.service.QuestionService
Returns only the questions that belong to the requested category and difficulty.
getQuestionText() - Method in class com.arcade.model.Question
Returns the main question text.
getRanking() - Method in class com.arcade.service.RankingService
Returns all stored ranking entries.
getRemainingLives() - Method in class com.arcade.model.GameSession
Returns the remaining lives.
getRemainingLives() - Method in class com.arcade.service.GameService
Returns the remaining lives.

getRoot() - Method in class com.arcade.view.GameView

getRoot() - Method in class com.arcade.view.RankingView
 
getRoot() - Method in class com.arcade.view.ResultView
 
getScore() - Method in class com.arcade.model.RankingEntry
Returns the final score.
getScore() - Method in class com.arcade.service.GameService
Returns the current score.
getSubmitButton() - Method in class com.arcade.view.ResultView
 
getTopScores(int) - Method in class com.arcade.service.RankingService
Returns the top ranking entries ordered by score in descending order.

H

hasMoreQuestions() - Method in class com.arcade.service.GameService
Returns whether there are more questions available.
HeaderPanelView - Class in com.arcade.view
Builds the game header with lives icons and score labels.
HeaderPanelView(String, String) - Constructor for class com.arcade.view.HeaderPanelView
 

I

isGameOver() - Method in class com.arcade.model.GameSession
Returns whether the game is over.
isGameOver() - Method in class com.arcade.service.GameService
Returns whether the game is over.

J

JsonUtils - Class in com.arcade.util
Provides JSON reading and deserialization helpers for application resources.

L

loadPlaylist() - Method in class com.arcade.service.AudioService
Loads every .mp3 file under the playlist resource folder.
loadQuestions() - Method in class com.arcade.service.QuestionService
Loads questions from the default JSON resource into memory.
loadQuestions() - Static method in class com.arcade.util.JsonUtils
Loads all questions from the default questions resource.
loadRanking() - Method in class com.arcade.service.RankingService
Loads ranking entries from the JSON file.

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class com.arcade.MainApplication
 
main(String[]) - Static method in class com.arcade.service.QuestionService
Temporary console entry point for manual verification.
MainApplication - Class in com.arcade
JavaFX entry point for the arcade educational game.
MainApplication() - Constructor for class com.arcade.MainApplication
 
MainMenuView - Class in com.arcade.view
Builds the main menu screen.
MainMenuView() - Constructor for class com.arcade.view.MainMenuView
 
MenuController - Class in com.arcade.controller
Controls the main menu navigation.
MenuController(Scene) - Constructor for class com.arcade.controller.MenuController
 
MessageOverlayView - Class in com.arcade.view
Builds the temporary message overlay.
MessageOverlayView() - Constructor for class com.arcade.view.MessageOverlayView
 

O

openCategorySelection() - Method in class com.arcade.controller.MenuController
 

P

play() - Method in class com.arcade.service.AudioService
Starts playback if a playlist has been loaded and no track is currently active.
playNext() - Method in class com.arcade.service.AudioService
Plays the next track in the playlist, wrapping back to the first track after the last one.

Q

Question - Class in com.arcade.model
Represents a question as pure data for the arcade educational game.
Question() - Constructor for class com.arcade.model.Question
Creates an empty question.
Question(Integer, String, String, String, String, List<String>, String) - Constructor for class com.arcade.model.Question
Creates a question with all fields initialized.
QuestionCardView - Class in com.arcade.view
Builds the non-interactive question card.
QuestionCardView(String) - Constructor for class com.arcade.view.QuestionCardView
 
QuestionService - Class in com.arcade.service
Centralizes question loading and access for the application.
QuestionService() - Constructor for class com.arcade.service.QuestionService
Creates a question service and loads the initial question set.

R

RankingController - Class in com.arcade.controller
Controls the ranking screen and the return to the main menu.
RankingController(Scene, RankingService) - Constructor for class com.arcade.controller.RankingController
 
RankingEntry - Class in com.arcade.model
Represents a completed game result stored in the ranking file.
RankingEntry() - Constructor for class com.arcade.model.RankingEntry
Creates an empty ranking entry.
RankingEntry(String, int, LocalDateTime) - Constructor for class com.arcade.model.RankingEntry
Creates a ranking entry with all fields initialized.
RankingService - Class in com.arcade.service
Handles persistence and retrieval of ranking entries stored in a JSON file.
RankingService() - Constructor for class com.arcade.service.RankingService
Creates a ranking service that uses the default ranking file.
RankingService(Path) - Constructor for class com.arcade.service.RankingService
Creates a ranking service that uses the provided ranking file.
RankingView - Class in com.arcade.view
Builds the ranking screen.
RankingView(List<RankingEntry>) - Constructor for class com.arcade.view.RankingView
 
readQuestionsFromResource(String) - Static method in class com.arcade.util.JsonUtils
Loads questions from a JSON resource on the application classpath.
ResultView - Class in com.arcade.view
Builds the result screen.
ResultView(int) - Constructor for class com.arcade.view.ResultView
 
returnToMenu() - Method in class com.arcade.controller.RankingController
 

S

Saves the provided ranking entries into the JSON file.

start() - Method in class com.arcade.controller.MenuController
 
start(Stage) - Method in class com.arcade.MainApplication
 
startGame() - Method in class com.arcade.service.GameService
Starts a new game session using the first available category and resets the state.
startGame(String) - Method in class com.arcade.service.GameService
Starts a new game session using only questions from the selected category.
stop() - Method in class com.arcade.MainApplication
 
stop() - Method in class com.arcade.service.AudioService
Stops playback and disposes the active media player.
submitAnswer(String) - Method in class com.arcade.service.GameService
Submits an answer for the current question.
